name: Informix Software Overview
description: Aberdeen Group overview of Informix Software for sales training. Covers company profile (Top-10 ISV, fastest-growing RDBMS company), full product portfolio (SE, OnLine, Dynamic Server, XPS, specialized variants), parallel DSA technology architecture, database middleware (replication, connectivity), tools revenue ($150M of $470M in 1994, 500K+ licenses), application development tools (NewEra, 4GL, SQL Suite, CLI/ESQL), end-user access, and services. 38-slide deck used in Informix sales training.
